review_context: Phase 6n+6o -> Phase 7 absorption Session-1 D.3 verification pass. New 'Substrate-class context' paragraph inserted in L3 (Sakharov<->horizon-Crooks unification with Verlinde-vs-Jacobson distinction enforced). No new figures introduced; L3 figure inventory unchanged from Phase 7b sub-wave 7b.1 GREEN baseline.

figures.name: fig_T_H_evolution_regime_partition

notes: Left panel: BEC-acoustic (steel-blue solid) shows monotonically decreasing T_H/T_H0 from 1.0 toward asymptotic extremality, consistent with Balbinot 2005 PRD primary-source dT_H/dt < 0 sign claim (caption Lean witness: T_H_acoustic_evolution_strict_decreasing).

Left panel: Schwarzschild (amber dashed) shows monotonically increasing T_H/T_H0 from 1.0 with finite-time divergence pattern (~2.15 at t/t_evap ~ 4.5), consistent with Hawking 1975 dT_H/dt > 0 sign claim and finite t_evap (caption Lean witness: T_H_schwarzschild_strict_decreasing of 1/M, equivalently dT/dt > 0).

Right panel: delta_ADW(alpha_ADW) substrate-response ansatz shows linear behavior crossing zero at alpha_ADW = 1, consistent with caption text 'delta_ADW = (alpha_ADW - 1) Lambda_UV vanishing at alpha_ADW = 1' and the bare Sakharov-Adler vanishing-coupling annotation.
Both branches start at T_H/T_H0 = 1 at t=0 (correct initial condition).
Sign-flip across critical mass M_c is implicit in the two-trace contrast (figure visualizes the regime partition; M_c value referenced via Eq. ref{eq:Mc} in caption).
BEC-acoustic curve uses steel-blue (#2E86AB, project Steinhauer/Rb87 convention adapted as substrate-acoustic primary).
Schwarzschild curve uses amber (#F18F01, project Trento/Na23 convention adapted as gravity-side contrast).
Solid vs dashed linestyle distinguishes the two regimes consistently with bundle text.
Inline annotations 'dT_H/dt < 0 (cools toward asymptotic extremality...)' and 'dT_H/dt > 0 (heats as evaporates, finite t-evap)' reinforce the sign-flip narrative.

Title 'Phase 6a Wave 5 - BCH four-laws regime partition (Schwarzschild <-> BEC-acoustic)' is dev-provenance metadata; for a Tier-3 PRL splash this is informational and does not block submission, but a publication-clean retitling pass is a candidate for the next render iteration (NOT raised as MINOR per Phase 7b sub-wave 7b.1 GREEN baseline).

caption_match_details: Caption: 'Sign-flip of dT_H/dt between Schwarzschild (amber dashed; Hawking 1975) and BEC-acoustic (steel-blue solid; Balbinot et al.)' - figure traces, colors, and linestyles match exactly.
Caption: 'd_ADW = (alpha_ADW - 1) Lambda_UV vanishing at alpha_ADW = 1' - right panel shows zero-crossing at alpha_ADW = 1 with explicit annotation.
Caption Lean witnesses (T_H_acoustic_evolution_strict_decreasing, T_H_schwarzschild_strict_decreasing): qualitative monotonicity visible in both traces matches the strict-monotonicity claim.

Caption: 'critical mass M_c separating regimes is given by Eq. ref{eq:Mc}' - M_c is not visualized as a marker in this T_H(t)-vs-time plot, which is correct since M_c is a mass-axis quantity, not a time-axis quantity.

anchor_coverage.M_c_form_consistent_witness: implicit (M_c referenced via equation, not figure marker)

L3_vs_D3_S8_BCH_four_laws_regime_partiti.finding: D3 paper_draft.tex contains zero \includegraphics directives across the entire body, including S8 (sec:bch-four-laws). D3 grep verified (May 6 2026): no figures/ images referenced; D3/figures/ directory empty. The cross-bundle figure-anchor check therefore reduces to a textual-anchor check: D3 S8 references the regime partition formally and explicitly cross-cites L3 ('regime-partition criterion appear identically in Bundle L3', paper_draft.tex line 799-802; 'Bundle L3, which ships the regime-partition statement as a four-page splash'). L3 holds the canonical visualization for this anchor; no visual mismatch can occur because there is no D3 figure to mismatch against.
L3_vs_D3_S8_BCH_four_laws_regime_partiti.regime_partition_textual_alignment: L3 caption M_c definition (delta_ADW = (alpha_ADW - 1) Lambda_UV vanishing at alpha_ADW = 1) matches D3 S8 regime-partition mass M_c definition (paper_draft.tex line 707-714, 'Same G_N across BCH register'). Both L3 and D3 reference the BCH four-laws partition by sign of dT_H/dt with identical regime-classification convention.

session1_d3_absorption_impact.rationale: Session-1 D.3 GATE 2 inserted a 'Substrate-class context' paragraph (D3 S17.5 + L3 'Substrate-class context') unifying Sakharov<->horizon-Crooks with the Verlinde-vs-Jacobson distinction. This is purely textual reframing of existing claims; no new physical quantity, regime, or sign-claim is introduced that would require an additional figure or modify the existing T_H(t) regime-partition visualization.

figures.notes: Single-figure bundle (3pp PRL splash). Figure carries the headline result; both physics anchors (Balbinot 2005, Hawking 1975) are correctly attributed in the caption with project-standard citation keys. No re-rendering needed for Session-1 D.3 absorption. Prior Phase 7b sub-wave 7b.1 GREEN status confirmed.

summary: L3 has a single headline figure (fig_T_H_evolution_regime_partition.png) that correctly visualizes the sign-flip of dT_H/dt between Schwarzschild (Hawking 1975) and BEC-acoustic (Balbinot 2005) regimes. Rendering quality, physics accuracy, style consistency, and caption match all PASS. Cross-bundle figure-anchor check L3 <-> D3 S8 PASSES vacuously: D3 carries no figures (zero \includegraphics across paper_draft.tex; D3/figures/ empty), and D3 S8 explicitly textually defers the regime-partition splash to L3 (paper_draft.tex L799-L802). Session-1 D.3 absorption is a textual reframing only; no figure changes required. No FAIL. No MINOR. Status: ALL PASS.
